metadata.title: Map the Agentic Loop: Observe - Plan - Act - Check - Report with Claude
metadata.note: CLI video. Exclusions: ReAct vs. Reflexion framework comparison, multi-step planning benchmarks.

skin_warnings: B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'NikBearBrownOpen' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'NikBearBrownOutro' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. Nik Bear Brown. Build it with a CLI, then take it apart.

beats.role_note: the problem, context, stakes -- BEFORE the CLI opens
beats.narration_text: Ask Claude to narrate its own loop on a real task. The loop runs whether you label it or not -- Observe, Plan, Act, Check, Report. The Check stage is where agents self-certify instead of verify. You will not see it unless you ask for the labels.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- title card: THE LOOP RUNS EITHER WAY. Without labels, the Check stage is invisible.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Ask Claude to narrate its own loop on a real task. The loop runs whether you label it or not -- Observe, Plan, Act, Check, Report. The Check stage is where agen

beats.narration_text: Ask Claude to label each stage before doing it -- and at Check, list what it verified and how, not a self-certification.

props.command: claude "Perform this task with explicit loop narration: summarize three documents in [folder]. Label each step as Observe / Plan / Act / Check / Report before doing it. At Check: list specifically what you verified and how -- do not self-certify."

beats.narration_text: The loop trace parser reads Claude's labeled output and flags any Check stage that returns a self-report instead of a named artifact.

props.code:
import re, sys
STAGES = ["Observe","Plan","Act","Check","Report"]
text = open(sys.argv[1]).read()
for stage in STAGES:
    matches = re.findall(rf"{stage}:(.*?)(?={'|'.join(STAGES)}|$)",
                         text, re.DOTALL)
    for m in matches:
        is_self = any(w in m for w in
            ["verified successfully","confirmed","looks good"])
        tag = "SELF-REPORT" if is_self else "ARTIFACT"
        print(f"{stage}: [{tag}] {m.strip()[:80]}")

beats.narration_text: The labeled loop prints. Five stages visible. One Check stage says 'verified successfully' -- tagged SELF-REPORT, not an artifact.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- screen-recording: terminal showing loop trace with Observe/Plan/Act tagged ARTIFACT and one Check stage tagged SELF-REPORT highlighted in red

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The labeled loop prints. Five stages visible. One Check stage says 'verified successfully' -- tagged SELF-REPORT, not an artifact.

beats.narration_text: Now remove the loop-narration instruction and run the same task. What does the output look like without explicit stage labels?
Default output: no stage labels. The Check stage is gone. The agent completed the task -- but there is no visible moment where verification happened.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- screen-recording: terminal showing unlabeled summary output side-by-side comparison -- left has 5 labeled stages, right has prose output with no Check stage visible

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Default output: no stage labels. The Check stage is gone. The agent completed the task -- but there is no visible moment where verification happened.

beats.narration_text: The loop happens whether you ask for it or not. Naming the stages makes the Check stage visible -- and visible means you can require an artifact instead of a statement.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- recap card: NAME THE STAGES. The Check stage is invisible without explicit labels.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The loop happens whether you ask for it or not. Naming the stages makes the Check stage visible -- and visible means you can require an artifact instead of a st

beats.narration_text: On your next agentic task, require explicit stage labels at the Check stage. Verify the Check produces an artifact -- a named file, count, or diff -- not a statement.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- next-steps card: Require loop labels. At Check: demand an artifact, not 'verified successfully.'

build.suggested: suggested prompt: On your next agentic task, require explicit stage labels at the Check stage. Verify the Check produces an artifact -- a named file, count, or diff -- not a stat

beats.narration_text: Nik Bear Brown. Build it with a CLI. Then take it apart. At Nik Bear Brown, nikbearbrown dot com.
